title: paspalum hatschbachii
intro: Paspalum hatschbachii, also known as Hatschbach's paspalum, is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Paspalum hatschbachii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms of respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
